title: Trade Picker
description: Skip the RNG of breaking lecterns. Directly select exact vanilla villager trades (like Mending) from a GUI picker every time they level up. Get the lowest base prices instantly without trade cycling.
body:
# Trade Picker
#### _Now available for both Fabric & NeoForge_

**Pick the exact villager trades you want. No cycling. No luck.**

![Short clip of trade picker in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01274926fefba6b8a747e14bd5d411430f7d3719.gif)

Trade Picker replaces the workstation-cycling grind with a simple choice screen. Right-click any villager and instead of getting whatever trades the RNG decided, you see every trade that villager could possibly offer — then you pick the two you want. Your picks lock in permanently at the cheapest possible price, and reputation discounts from curing or Hero of the Village still stack on top.

---

## Features

### No more workstation cycling
Breaking and placing lecterns until a librarian rolls Mending is a time sink with no skill involved. Trade Picker removes the dice roll entirely — you always get exactly what you want, first try.

### Librarians: every enchantment, every level, as its own option
The picker lists every tradeable enchantment individually — Mending, Sharpness I through V, Fortune III, Looting III, Silk Touch, every Treasure enchantment — so you grab exactly the book you need without cycling through dozens of rerolls.

### Always the lowest price
All trades are offered at vanilla's minimum possible price. Cure a villager or earn Hero of the Village and those discounts apply on top, just like in vanilla.

### Built-in search
Type "mending", "fortune", "protection" or any item name to filter the picker instantly. Even a librarian's full list of 100+ book options becomes easy to navigate.

### Levels up with your villager
Every time your villager levels up — Novice, Apprentice, Journeyman, Expert, Master — the picker opens again for that level's trades. You stay in control the whole way up.

### Reset anytime
Hit the Reset button on any trade screen to wipe a villager back to Novice and re-pick from scratch. A confirmation prompt keeps it from firing by accident.

### Multiplayer protection
On shared servers, each villager is claimed by the first player to interact with it. Only that player — or a server operator — can reset or change its trades. Your emerald shop stays yours.

---

## Trade Picker vs. trade cycling mods

| | Trade cycling mods | **Trade Picker** |
|---|---|---|
| Get specific trades | Eventually, with luck | ✅ First try, every time |
| Librarian enchantment choice | Random | ✅ Pick any enchant + level |
| Lowest vanilla price | ✅ | ✅ |
| Works on all professions | ✅ | ✅ |
| Adds no new items or recipes | Varies | ✅ |
| Multiplayer trade protection | ❌ | ✅ |

---

## Compatibility

Works with the mods you're already using:

- **Sodium / Embeddium** ✅
- **Iris / Oculus** ✅
- **Lithium / Starlight** ✅
- **ModMenu** ✅
- **EMI / JEI / REI** ✅

**Heads-up:** Don't install alongside other trade-cycling mods. They're solving the same problem a different way — you only need one, and they may conflict.

---

## Install
### Fabric
1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for Minecraft 26.1.2
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop the Trade Picker jar into your `mods` folder
4. **On a server:** install on both server and client

### NeoForge
1. Install NeoForge 26.1.2 or newer in the 26.1 line
2. Drop tradeoptimizer-neoforge-<version>.jar into your `mods` folder

No config needed. Right-click a villager and it just works.

---
